sources: Montgomery County BoE 2026 Candidate Petition Report (6/1/2026)
notes: Keys under each jurisdiction type match exact values in enriched_voters.parquet (verified 2026-06-23).
WARD/LOCAL_SCHOOL_DISTRICT/TOWNSHIP/VILLAGE stubs pending manual data entry from individual jurisdictions.
STATE_SENATE_DISTRICT 06 is not on the 2026 ballot (even-cycle seat last contested 2024); incumbent TBD.
Precinct central committee (precinct captains) are covered in serve/precinct_captains.json, keyed by exact PRECINCT_NAME parquet values.
COUNTY_COMMISSIONER and COUNTY_AUDITOR deferred to post-beta per handoff spec.

06.note: Not on 2026 ballot (even-cycle seat). Incumbent data pending.

39.note: No incumbent checkbox in filing data; may be open seat due to redistricting.
